name: cs-indicators

outputs.description: Malicious MD5 hash file File.SHA1 Malicious SHA-1 hash file
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: Malicious SHA-256 hash file Malicious.Vendor For malicious files, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: For malicious files, the reason that the vendor made that decision File.Reports For malicious files, the associated reports describing the hash
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: For malicious files, the associated actors File.MalwareFamilies For malicious files, the associated malware family
outputs.name: File.Actors

outputs.description: For malicious files, the associated kill chain URL.Data Malicious URL
outputs.name: File.KillChains

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision URL.Malicious.Description For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made that decision
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the associated reports describing the URL URL.Actors For malicious URLs, the associated actors
outputs.name: URL.Reports

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the associated malware family URL.KillChains For malicious URLs, the associated kill chain
outputs.name: URL.MalwareFamilies

outputs.description: Malicious domain Domain.Malicious.Vendor For malicious domains, the vendor that made the decision
outputs.name: Domain.Name

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the reason that the vendor made that decision Domain.Reports For malicious domains, the associated reports describing the domain
outputs.name: Domain.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the associated actors Domain.MalwareFamilies For malicious domains, the associated malware family
outputs.name: Domain.Actors

outputs.description: For malicious domains, the associated kill chain IP.Address IP Indicators
outputs.name: Domain.KillChains

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the vendor that made the decision IP.Malicious.Description For malicious IP addresses, the reason that the vendor made that decision
outputs.name: IP.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the associated reports describing the IP IP.Actors For malicious IP addresses, the associated actors
outputs.name: IP.Reports

outputs.description: For malicious IP addresses, the associated malware family IP.KillChains For malicious IP addresses, the associated kill chain
outputs.name: IP.MalwareFamilies

outputs.description: The indicator tested DBotScore.Type Type of indicator tested
outputs.name: DBotScore.Indicator

outputs.description: Vendor used to calculate the score DBotScore.Score The actual score
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
